hooks.command: MINDGRAPH_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ -d "$MINDGRAPH_ROOT/.mindgraph" ]; then python3 -m tools fingerprint "$MINDGRAPH_ROOT" --file "$CLAUDE_FILE" 2>/dev/null & fi

MINDGRAPH_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ -d "$MINDGRAPH_ROOT/.mindgraph" ]; then echo '[MindGraph] Knowledge base detected. Use search before reading files: python3 -m tools search . "query"'; fi
